description: Decision log for architectural and design decisions

decisions.title: AppShell Scroll Ownership
decisions.decision: AppShell owns page scroll via .factory-workstation-frame with overflow-y-auto
decisions.rationale: Centralized scroll ownership prevents layout instability and ensures consistent sticky behavior across all routes
alternatives: Page-level scroll containers - rejected due to inconsistency and sticky header issues
Body-level scroll - rejected due to breaking sticky elements
decisions.impact: All pages must render into AppShell's scroll container, not create their own

decisions.title: Single Indigo Accent Color
decisions.decision: Use single indigo accent (#6366f1) for all primary actions, links, focus states
decisions.rationale: Single accent creates clear visual hierarchy and modern professional feel, avoiding cluttered multi-accent designs
alternatives: Warm orange #c56d2d - rejected as dated and cyberpunk
Multiple accents - rejected as confusing and cluttered
decisions.impact: All primary actions, links, and focus states use indigo #6366f1

decisions.title: Sentence Case Typography
decisions.decision: Use sentence case for all UI text (labels, buttons, headings)
decisions.rationale: Sentence case is more readable, modern, and respectful compared to UPPERCASE which feels aggressive and dated
alternatives: UPPERCASE - rejected as aggressive, hard to read, dated
Title Case - rejected as too formal for operational software
decisions.impact: All UI text must use sentence case except acronyms (OCR, API, ID)

decisions.title: No Gradient Backgrounds
decisions.decision: Use solid colors only, no gradient backgrounds or glow effects
decisions.rationale: Gradients and glows create cyberpunk/SOC dashboard aesthetic, not modern professional operational software
alternatives: Warm gradient backgrounds - rejected as dated and cyberpunk
Colored radial gradients - rejected as visually overwhelming
decisions.impact: All backgrounds must be solid colors from design tokens

decisions.title: Inter Font Family
decisions.decision: Use Inter for all UI text, JetBrains Mono only for code/technical data
decisions.rationale: Inter is modern, readable, and operational. IBM Plex Sans feels dated and too warm
alternatives: IBM Plex Sans - rejected as dated
Space Grotesk - rejected as too decorative
System fonts - rejected as inconsistent
decisions.impact: All UI text uses Inter, monospace reserved for code/IDs/timestamps

decisions.title: 40px Default Row Height
decisions.decision: Use 40px default row height (36px compact, 48px comfortable)
decisions.rationale: 40px provides modern breathable density with good touch targets, 34px feels cramped and dated
alternatives: 34px - rejected as too cramped, poor touch targets
44px - rejected as too loose for operational density
decisions.impact: All tables and lists use 40px row height by default

decisions.title: Surface Differentiation Over Borders
decisions.decision: Use different background shades to create hierarchy, not heavy borders
decisions.rationale: Surface differentiation creates clean modern hierarchy, heavy borders feel cluttered and dated
alternatives: Border differentiation - rejected as cluttered
Heavy borders - rejected as dated
decisions.impact: Use subtle 1px borders with surface shade differences for hierarchy

decisions.title: Explicit Height Containment
decisions.decision: All scroll containers must have explicit height (h-[calc(100dvh-200px)] or similar)
decisions.rationale: Explicit height prevents layout instability and ensures scroll works correctly
alternatives: Implicit height - rejected as causes scroll failures
Percentage height - rejected as unreliable in flex layouts
decisions.impact: All scroll containers require explicit height constraint

decisions.title: 14px Body Text
decisions.decision: Use 14px for primary body text, 13px for table cells
decisions.rationale: 14px is readable and operational, 11-12px is too small for body text
alternatives: 16px - rejected as too large for operational density
12px - rejected as too small, accessibility concern
decisions.impact: All body text uses 14px, tables use 13px for density

decisions.title: Functional Motion Only
decisions.decision: Motion is functional (state changes) only, not decorative. Max 150ms transitions
decisions.rationale: Decorative animations are distracting and slow down operational workflows
alternatives: Decorative animations - rejected as distracting
Slow transitions (300ms+) - rejected as sluggish
